subcodes.first_line: O leaf stirred by the fragrances of the gardens! That which thou didst write was noted, and it was a proof of steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مهتزه از نفحات ریاض آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید دلیل ثبوت بود
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
